articles.title: Israeli forces hit same building twice in al-Duwayr, NNA says
articles.summary: Israeli forces hit same building twice in al-Duwayr, NNA says Israeli forces carried out a double strike on a building in the southern Lebanese town of al-Duwayr, causing an unconfirmed number of civilian casualties, according to Lebanon’s state-run National News Agency. The agency said the first attack occurred at about 10:20 pm local time, with a second strike hitting the same location roughly 30 minutes later. articles.title: Brent crude drops below $100 as markets weigh Iran talks
articles.summary: Brent crude drops below $100 as markets weigh Iran talks Global oil prices fell sharply as uncertainty surrounding a potential agreement between Washington and Tehran heightened concerns about the economic impact of continued disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude futures dropped $4.64, or 4.48 percent, to $98.90 a barrel by 22:03 GMT. US West Texas Intermediate crude also declined, falling $4.42, or 4.58 percent, to $92.18 a barrel.
